title: Prospecting
theme: Master the sales process — start conversations

learn.label: Learn
learn.headline: Start conversations with purpose
learn.summary: You are a financial entrepreneur. Prospecting turns your blueprint into real client conversations.
bullets: Opening lines that invite dialogue, not pressure
learn.callout: Advise segment (Weeks 5–7): master the sales process.

workshop.label: Workshop
workshop.headline: Prospecting practice
workshop.summary: Role-play openings and build your first prospect list.
bullets: List natural-market names aligned to your persona
Coach feedback on tone and clarity

assignment.label: Assignment
assignment.headline: Prospecting log
bullets: Add prospects from your natural market
Record contact attempts and next steps
Stay aligned with your ideal customer from Week 2

reflection.label: Reflection
reflection.headline: What felt natural in outreach?
prompts: Which opener felt most like you?
Who will you contact next week?
